race.comment: HAIIRO (2) is a progressive type who has raced just three times for two minors before a 2000m maiden win latest. Given a spell and looks suited at the mile fresh. Surely improved and worth keeping safe fresh. ZIGGY STARCRAFT (7) wasn't far away last time when having his first run for the new yard and off a let-up. Extra ground is a plus and can measure up. TARSHIN (10) went back but ran on hard late and was beaten in a photo here over this trip last time. Looks a top chance with a repeat of that performance.  LUCKYHELEFT (3) is a hurdler resuming and will be better into the autumn but can ran a race fresh.
